message:
perf(pager): re-apply V1.3 eager PageData in StagedPage::from_buf

Re-applies the eager PageData creation that was reverted in eaefe615.
The original crash was caused by V2.2's FusedOpenWriteLast peephole
(now disabled in 6b6871b8), not by this change.

StagedPage is never mutated after creation — only replaced wholesale
via insert_staged_page. So eagerly creating the published PageData at
write time is correct and avoids the lazy 4KB copy + Arc allocation
on the first read of each dirty page.

Verified: all 20 V1+V2 regression tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
